mapper.insert:
SELECT (MAX(FILE_SQ) + 1, 0) FILESQ FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = #{UUID}
INSERT INTO STOCATCH ( GATE_CD, UUID, UUID_SQ, FILE_SQ, FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXTENSION, REAL_FILE_NM, BIZ_TYPE, REG_DATE, REG_USER_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_USER_ID, DEL_FLAG, ENC_FLAG, COMPANY_CD, PR_BUYER_CD, COMPANY_DEPT, PR_DEPT_CD, UP_DATE, HASH_NUM ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd}, #{UUID}, #{UUID_SQ}, #{fileSeq}, #{fileName}, #{FILE_PATH}, #{FILE_SIZE}, #{EXTENSION}, #{REAL_FILE_NM}, #{BIZ_TYPE}, SYSDATE, #{ses.userId}, SYSDATE, #{ses.userId}, '0', #{ENC_FLAG}, #{ses.companyCd}, #{PR_BUYER_CD}, #{ses.deptCd}, #{PR_DEPT_CD}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), #{HASH_NUM} )
mapper.sql:
SELECT UUID , UUID_SQ , FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , MAX(FILE_SIZE) AS FILE_SIZE , MAX(FILE_SQ) AS FILE_SQ , FILE_EXTENSION , REAL_FILE_NM , FILE_COUNT , BIZ_TYPE , DEL_FLAG , ENC_FLAG FROM ( (SELECT UUID UUID, UUID_SQ, FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SQ, FILE_EXTENSION, REAL_FILE_NM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = GATE_CD AND UUID = #{UUID} AND DEL_FLAG = 0) AS FILE_COUNT, BIZ_TYPE, DEL_FLAG, ENC_FLAG,
TO_CHAR(FILE_SIZE) AS FILE_SIZE
CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), FILE_SIZE) AS FILE_SIZE
FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = (CASE WHEN #{ses.gateCd} IS NULL OR #{ses.gateCd} = '' THEN '100' ELSE #{ses.gateCd} END) AND UUID = #{UUID} AND DEL_FLAG = 0) ) T WHERE 1 = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT UUID , UUID_SQ , FILE_NM , FILE_PATH , FILE_SIZE , FILE_SQ , FILE_EXTENSION , REAL_FILE_NM , FILE_COUNT , BIZ_TYPE , DEL_FLAG , ENC_FLAG FROM ( (SELECT UUID UUID, UUID_SQ, FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SQ, FILE_EXTENSION, REAL_FILE_NM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = GATE_CD AND UUID = #{UUID} AND DEL_FLAG = 0) AS FILE_COUNT, BIZ_TYPE, DEL_FLAG, ENC_FLAG,
TO_CHAR(FILE_SIZE) AS FILE_SIZE
CONVERT(NVARCHAR(MAX), FILE_SIZE) AS FILE_SIZE
FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = CASE WHEN #{ses.gateCd} IS NULL THEN #{ses.gateCd} ELSE #{ses.gateCd} END AND UUID = #{UUID} AND DEL_FLAG = 0) ) T WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND UPPER(T.FILE_EXTENSION) = UPPER('xls') AND ROWNUM = 1
AND T.DEL_FLAG = 0 GROUP BY UUID, UUID_SQ, FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_EXTENSION, REAL_FILE_NM, FILE_COUNT, BIZ_TYPE, DEL_FLAG, ENC_FLAG ORDER BY MAX(T.FILE_SQ) ASC

AND T.UUID_SQ = #{UUID_SQ}
AND T.DEL_FLAG = 0 GROUP BY UUID, UUID_SQ, FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_EXTENSION, REAL_FILE_NM, FILE_COUNT, BIZ_TYPE, DEL_FLAG, ENC_FLAG ORDER BY MAX(T.FILE_SQ) ASC

SELECT IVAP.AP_NUM , IVAP.AP_REQ_SUBJECT , (IVAP.AP_REQ_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS AP_REQ_DATE , GETVENDORNAME(IVAP.GATE_CD, IVAP.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM FROM STOCIVAP IVAP WHERE IVAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVAP.AP_NUM = #{AP_NUM} AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT FNM.EPRO_PS_DSC ,FNM.CORP_NO ,FNM.BRC ,FNM.APLY_DT ,FNM.USER_ID ,FNM.CONT_TBL_PK ,FNM.FILE_SIZE ,FNM.UUID ,FNM.UUID_SQ ,FNM.FILE_PATH ,FNM.FILE_NM ,FNM.FILE_EXTENSION ,FNM.BIZ_TYPE ,FNM.REAL_FILE_NM ,FNM.VENDOR_CD ,TO_CHAR(FNM.FINAL_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD') AS FINAL_DATE ,TO_CHAR((CASE WHEN FNM.FILE_SIZE < 10 THEN 1000 ELSE (CASE WHEN (FNM.FILE_SIZE - 10) <= 100 THEN 1000 + ((FNM.FILE_SIZE - 10) * 100 ) ELSE 1000 + ( 100 * 100 ) END) END),'999,999') AS COST FROM ( SELECT '2' AS EPRO_PS_DSC ,VNGL.IRS_NO AS CORP_NO ,'000000' AS BRC ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT ,ATCH.REG_USER_ID AS USER_ID ,'FILE' || '@@' || ATCH.UUID || '@@' || ATCH.UUID_SQ AS CONT_TBL_PK ,(CASE WHEN ROUND(ATCH.FILE_SIZE/1048576) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ROUND(ATCH.FILE_SIZE/1048576) END) AS FILE_SIZE ,ATCH.UUID AS UUID ,ATCH.UUID_SQ AS UUID_SQ ,ATCH.FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH ,ATCH.FILE_NM AS FILE_NM ,ATCH.FILE_EXTENSION AS FILE_EXTENSION ,ATCH.BIZ_TYPE AS BIZ_TYPE ,ATCH.REAL_FILE_NM AS REAL_FILE_NM ,VNGL.VENDOR_CD ,(CASE WHEN NVL(ATCH.IF_YN,'0') = '0' THEN ATCH.REG_DATE ELSE ATCH.FEE_DATE END) AS FINAL_DATE FROM STOCATCH ATCH JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (ATCH.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND ATCH.PR_BUYER_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD) JOIN STOCCODD CODD ON (ATCH.BIZ_TYPE = CODD.CODE) WHERE ATCH.GATE_CD = '100' AND ATCH.UUID = #{UUID} AND ATCH.UUID_SQ = #{UUID_SQ} AND ATCH.FILE_SIZE > 0 AND ATCH.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ATCH.PR_BUYER_CD != 'S00254' AND CODD.CODE_TYPE = 'MP091' AND CODD.USE_FLAG = '1' AND ((NVL(ATCH.IF_YN,'0') = '0' AND ATCH.REG_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE('20210301') AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12),'YYYYMM')||'01')) OR (NVL(ATCH.IF_YN,'0') = '1' AND ATCH.FEE_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE('20210301') AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12),'YYYYMM')||'01')) ) ) FNM

SELECT A.UUID FROM ( SELECT IVAP.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID FROM STOCIVAP IVAP JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.INV_NUM = IVAP.INV_NUM AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = IVAP.PO_NUM AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVAP.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVAP.AP_NUM = #{AP_NUM} AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0' UNION SELECT IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM2 AS UUID FROM STOCIVAP IVAP JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.INV_NUM = IVAP.INV_NUM AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = IVAP.PO_NUM AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVAP.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVAP.AP_NUM = #{AP_NUM} AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0' UNION SELECT IVAP.PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID FROM STOCIVAP IVAP JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.INV_NUM = IVAP.INV_NUM AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = IVAP.PO_NUM AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVAP.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVAP.AP_NUM = #{AP_NUM} AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0' UNION SELECT IVAP.BILL_ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID FROM STOCIVAP IVAP JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.INV_NUM = IVAP.INV_NUM AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = IVAP.PO_NUM AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVAP.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVAP.AP_NUM = #{AP_NUM} AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0' UNION SELECT (SELECT ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCATTS WHERE VENDOR_CD = IVHD.VENDOR_CD AND BUYER_CD = '1000' AND GATE_CD = '100' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND TMPL_SQ = '1') AS UUID FROM STOCIVAP IVAP JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.INV_NUM = IVAP.INV_NUM AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = IVAP.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = IVAP.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = IVAP.PO_NUM AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVAP.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVAP.AP_NUM = #{AP_NUM} AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A
